send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

conversation.message_text: Bonafide: Reply Y to receive recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Bonafide.
Bonafide: Welcome to Bonafide! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/4Yz
Bonafide: Welcome to Bonafide texts! You're now signed up to receive exclusive offers and updates. Visit our site: https://bonafide.attn.tv/aE-qxI7wPlGH

Bonafide: Hi Renee, this is Sarah! Thanks for checking out our site! https://bonafide.attn.tv/alTVhIHlm5Sd .

Any questions about Bonafide or our products?
Yes, this is my first time ordering your product and there was a 45% off offer that I don't think I received. I paid $150 for three months worth.
Bonafide: Thank you for your purchase! I can check with my team if we can apply the code SMS20 to your subscription. Can I have your order number and email address, please?
E4EMOQYZFrodriguesrenee26@yahoo.com

Bonafide: Thanks. It looks like the code SMS20 applies for a 20% discount. Unfortunately, I don't have any details about the 45% off offer. Could you let me know where you saw that? If possible, please send a screenshot, and I'd be glad to help further!
I just looked and it's gone I saw that yesterday when I ordered from Facebook
So what discount can you give me
It did say 45%.....on your site
Also I made my first purchase yesterday for 3 months worth I can order as I go right? Not on automatic delivery

Bonafide: I understand. I'm sorry, but I don't have information about the 45% off offer from Facebook. Could you please provide a screenshot of the 45% off offer so I can check? However, I can offer you a discount code: SARAH20. This code gives you 20% off your first month of a subscription. 

Regarding your order, with the Revaree Plus 3 Month Plan, it's a subscription plan where you'll receive deliveries every 90 days. If you prefer to order as you go rather than having automatic deliveries, you would need to make a one-time purchase for a single box each time you place an order. I hope this clarifies! If you have more questions or need further help, just let me know!
Ok can you please credit me for the 20% off coupon for the purchase I already made ?
Bonafide: Thank you so much for the purchase and I'll be happy to help! I can check with my team if we can apply the code to your order. Can I please have your order number and email address?
I gave it to you already
Bonafide: Sorry about that. I'll forward this to my team now and get back to you the second I have an update. Hang tight!
Bonafide: If you're dealing with vaginal dryness during menopause, read on for ways to bring comfort to your life. https://bonafide.attn.tv/aBaqPOhZlrK2

Bonafide: Hey again! I just heard from the team who let me know that the 45% discount you saw online includes 20% off for the first subscription order using a discount code and a 25% remaining discount is the savings you are getting for signing up for a 3-month plan for Revaree Plus instead of buying it as a one-time order.

You were able to get the 25% savings on your first order since a one-time order of Revaree Plus costs $63 plus taxes and shipping fee and with a 3-month plan, you are able to get each box for only $47 before taxes, with free shipping included.

To apply the remaining 20% off, may I confirm the discount code you saw online?

I look forward to your response, and if you have any further questions or concerns, please let me know. We're always here to support you.
SARAH20
For 20% off
Bonafide: Thank you for confirming. Let me go ahead and forward this to the team again and I'll send you a message as soon as I get an update!

Bonafide: Hello, I appreciate your patience! I just heard back from my team. We've issued you a refund for $28.20 (20% of $141), which should be processed in the next 3-5 business days; however, please allow up to 10 business days for this to show on your bank statement.

If there's anything else that I can do for you, please let me know. We're always here to support you.
Ok thank you
Bonafide: You're most welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with today while I still have you?

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS
Send to CS for refund inquiries
tone: Close the convo once the client takes over
Close the convo if the cx first message is ok, no, etc.
Don't use the word "off" when talking about promotions
dos_and_donts: Don't proactively offer to find pricing info, redirect them to the website instead
promo_and_exclusions: Do not offer a coupon to first time purchasers/subscribers. There is not an active discount code at this time. Use DCI shortcut
